title: Add Kalos Master to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Kalos Master](https://kalos-master.vercel.app) to image
- Kalos Master is an AI-powered garment design studio that converts imagination into detailed garment visuals in seconds without requiring design skills or software.

Fixes #10939

gist.headline: Haute couture for the hive
gist.blurb: Kalos Master just landed in the community showcase. It's an AI garment design studio that turns your fashion ideas into pixels before you can even thread a needle.
gist.summary: Added Kalos Master, an AI-powered garment design studio that generates detailed clothing visuals, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover Kalos Master in the ecosystem to instantly generate fashion concepts without needing traditional design software.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces an AI garment design app. Key symbols: fashion, tailoring, digital clothing, design studio. Characters: Polly the Bee acting as a tailor/designer, interacting with digital fabrics or a glowing screen showing a dress.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tailor's measuring tape scarf, hovering next to a retro computer monitor displaying a beautiful pixel-art dress. A chunky Monitor Robot companion holds up a glowing digital fabric swatch. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
